event: Interior domestic scene with a seated figure
description: An interior scene with warm red-orange walls. A figure in dark clothing sits in the lower center, leaning forward slightly. Behind the figure, a table or shelf holds several large decorative vases — one tall and pale, another green — and a bowl of fruit. Two framed paintings hang on the wall above, one appearing to show a standing female figure. The room is rendered in loose, expressive brushwork with rich color contrasts between the warm walls, dark furniture, and the teal-blue floor.
